title: Rebellious mercenary
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Otheruses|Unidentified mercenary}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:Rebellious_mercenary.jpg]] |name=Rebellious mercenary |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]] (presumed) |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Imperial Remnant]] **[[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] *[[Disciples of Ragnos]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You were a stormtrooper?''"
"''Yeah, but I couldn't stand taking orders, so I jumped ship first chance I got.|Mercenary and the former stormtrooper|''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''}} A '''rebellious [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]]''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked for the [[Sith cult/Legends|Sith cult]] known as the [[Disciples of Ragnos]]. He was a former [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] in the [[Imperial Remnant]] who hated taking orders, so he left without any notice when he had the chance. He was possibly killed by [[Jaden Korr]] during the [[Mission to Chandrila]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Disciples of Ragnos members]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial defectors]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Mercenaries]] [[Category:Stormtroopers of the Imperial Remnant]]
